title: Cobblemon Updated Enhanced
description: This mod is designed for Cobblemon modpacks to help improve the Cobblemon experience in multi server setups.
body:
This mod is designed for Cobblemon modpacks to help improve the Cobblemon experience in multi server setups.


Features included in the mod:
- Modpack rewards, notifies the server what modpack is in use, used by servers to give you rewards for using their modpack.
- Auto reconnect, reconnects to servers that use the ambassador plugin to switch between realms.

The mod does not modify the base game, it is only intended for server modpacks. It changes nothing for the single player experience, but may grant you additional features on servers.
